plist:
< CFBundleDevelopmentRegion $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE) CFBundleDisplayName LyraPay CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleInfoDictionaryVersion 6.0 CFBundleName lyrapay CFBundlePackageType APPL CFBundleShortVersionString $(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME) CFBundleSignature ???? CFBundleVersion $(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER) LSRequiresIPhoneOS
CFBundleURLTypes
CFBundleURLName lyrapay.auth CFBundleURLSchemes
lyrapay
NSCameraUsageDescription LyraPay needs camera access to scan QR codes and voucher codes. NSFaceIDUsageDescription LyraPay uses Face ID to secure your wallet.
UILaunchStoryboardName LaunchScreen UIMainStoryboardFile Main UISupportedInterfaceOrientations
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait
UISupportedInterfaceOrientations~ipad
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait
UIViewControllerBasedStatusBarAppearance
